{{Quote|Gentlebeings, I'm certain we can find a way to do business.|Lady Valles Santhe|<ref name="Mission to Lianna">''[[Mission to Lianna]]''</ref>}}
[[Lady/Legends|Lady]] '''Valles Santhe''' was the head of the [[Santhe family/Legends|Santhe family]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and as such controlled the [[Santhe Corporation/Legends|Santhe Corporation]] and its subsidiaries [[Santhe/Sienar Technologies]] and [[Santhe Security]].

==Biography==
Valles was the granddaughter of the [[Lianna/Legends|Liann]] industrialist [[Kerred Santhe]], who acquired a controlling share in [[Sienar Technologies]] and its subsidiary [[Republic Sienar Systems/Legends|Republic Sienar Systems]] c. [[99 BBY/Legends|99 BBY]]. Sienar Technologies was renamed [[Santhe/Sienar Technologies]] and Republic Sienar Systems eventually became [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]], manufacturer of the [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] fighters.

Lady Santhe was a small woman with black hair and flashing dark eyes whose presence commanded an unmistakable air of authority. She was an arrogant woman who was used to almost unlimited wealth and power. Her companies factories employed a large percentage of the population of [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]]. She openly supported the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] but in reality she was a firm believer in Liann independence and did not particularly care for the Empire or the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

When Santhe/Sienar Technologies received an Imperial defense contract (Codename [[NOVA]]) to develop an improvement of the [[Energy Emittance Baffler]], a key component of a [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]], the [[Imperial Advisor/Legends|Imperial Advisor]] [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Rodin Hlian Verpalion]] was assigned to oversee the project. Valles treated Lord Verpalion with caution but secretly hated him. She manipulated his visits carefully so as to ensure good reports to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].

Following the Emperor's death during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], she was able to attain a degree of independence for her homeworld, despite the pro-Imperial attempts of Lord Verpalion. When the CEO of Santhe/Sienar Technologies, [[Raith Sienar/Legends|Raith Sienar]], was assassinated, Lady Santhe took direct control of the company. She created [[Sienar Army Systems]] which manufactured the [[TIE crawler/Legends|Century tank]] and other ground vehicles for the [[Dark Empire]] under the reborn Emperor. However, she also used the weapons as a threat to prevent an occupation of Lianna by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Gronn]].
